Video.summary: Anglers get into some slaty treats in the backwater bayous.
Video.grandparentTitle: SportFishing TV | Loving Louisiana
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The team from Wired2Fish delivers the goods on how to catch the biggest fish—wherever or whenever you're casting lines.
Video.grandparentTitle: Wired2Fish | Baits and Gear For the Biggest Catch
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Lindner team takes viewers to the best locations for the biggest fish.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim explains how effective drop shotting can be for largemouth bass when the bass are keying in on bedding bluegills.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jim Crowley Outdoors | Jiggin' & Drop Shottin'
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jarrett and his guest tournament angler Kip Bennett fish the clear waters of Lake Powell for a variety of multi species angling
Video.grandparentTitle: Jarrett Edwards Outdoors — The More Species the Better
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim shows the effectiveness of swim jigs for both largemouth and smallmouth bass in extremely clear water
Video.grandparentTitle: Jim Crowley Outdoors | Swim Jiggin' It
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: It’s Walleye Time! This week, we're heading to Peshtigo, Wisconsin, to fish for post-spawn walleye. Joined by his guide clients, Larry teaches the ins and outs of how to catch these finicky fish!
Video.grandparentTitle: Larry Smith Outdoors | Post-Spawn Walleye
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Join us as we head to Frederick House Lake in Connaught, Ontario, just east of Timmins. With a narrow window of opportunity before the weather closes in, we reel in some fantastic walleye, sauger, and other exciting species. It's all about adapting to the elements and making the most of the moment!
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Storm’s Edge Success: Fishing Frederick House Lake
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing legend Hank Parker take viewers to the most secluded locations for the biggest fish.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Fishing
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Learn the best gear and strategies to target the biggest fish in the pre-spawn spring angling season.
Video.grandparentTitle: Spring Fishing Tips and Tricks
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Al Lindner and Jeff Klozinski spend the day tracking down postspawn smallmouth.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lindner's Angling Edge | Finding Transitional Smallmouth
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: South Dakota’s scenic Lake Oahe sets the stage for this week’s episode. Although well known as a walleye fishery, Kim and Cheyenne Ridge Signature Lodge, General Manager, Sean Finley reveal the under-utilized fishery within the overpopulation of smallmouth bass and respectable northern pike. Strike King’s Dream Shot Worm is the featured lure.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hook 'n Look — Hunger is the Best Pickle
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: If you're a bass fisherman, you have most likely heard of the world-class Lake El Salto. Dave Brown from Okuma Fishing Tackle and professional bass fisherman Todd Kline rally up with Savage Gear and test out their rat and duck lures on this Stoked On Fishing adventure.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Largemouth Bass Fishing at Lake El Salto
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Purple Heart, Bronze Star recipient, and Vietnam War Veteran Harold Klegin and Host Jay Garstecki hit the water on a small lake in Wisconsin. Harold is full of endless jokes, laughs, and of course stories.
Video.grandparentTitle: Operation Fishing Freedom - Vietnam Veteran Harold Klegin
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Shaw proves why lipless crankbaits are must-have weapons in the bass angler's arsenal.
Video.grandparentTitle: One More Cast — Lipless in Kissimmee
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Tournament veteran and fishing guide, Art Ferguson accompanies Kim in the Orlando area, in search of giant pre-spawn Florida largemouth. However, the two experience a baffling conundrum, which Kim documents from beneath the water's surface.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hook 'n Look — Which Way Did They Go?
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Accompanied by his friend Mike Ebach, Kim probes the vegetated aggregation of cattail reed beds. Then later capitalizes on the knowledge learned with a new weedless hollow-bodied bait by Strike King—the Hack Attack Pad Perch.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hook 'n Look — Cattail Classroom
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hank is headed to SC to spend a day with some of his favorites young pals at The Boy's Farm in Newberry. Hank & the boys target stripers on beautiful Lake Murray.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Outdoors: Fishing for stripers on Lake Murray
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Kids with life-threatenting illnesses are in need of help & hope. Today Hank shares his boat with Outdoor Dream Foundation.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Outdoors: Making dreams a reality
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hank shares the water with some youth bass anglers. He teaches the anglers how to read and fish new water.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Fishing - Alabama Challenge
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hank Parker goes after the fish on Lake Monticello with friend Bobby Williams.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Fishing - Lake Monticello
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hank Parker spends a day catching fish with well-known Christian author Dennis Rainey.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Fishing - Grosse Savanne Bass Fishing
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hank and close friend/business partner, Keith Kelly return to Hank's premiere signature lake.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Outdoors: Big Bass at Rockhouse Farms
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fom South Carolina to Texas, today's show covers 1,500 miles of bass fishing & baseball fun. Hank's grandson pitcher, Alec takes a break from sports camp to join "pawpaw."
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Outdoors: 'Pitching' for bass
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hank sets out with two next-generation fishermen... high schoolers with a hunger for the outdoors. He shares his tricks of the trade as he & his young friends land some big bass using a variety baits.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker: High School Bassin'
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hank Parker spends a day on Lake Hartwell chasing after the fish and sharing his boat with Outdoor Dream Foundation friends.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Fishing - Lake Hartwell
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: James and Al Lindner head to the Alexandria area to catch smallmouth bass using some proven and new finesse tactics.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lindner's Angling Edge | Finesse Tactics For Smallmouth
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Operation Fishing Freedom heads south to the Gulf Of Mexico with Vietnam Army Medic John Hitchens in search of a shark. He shares his story of being a medic during the Vietnam War to becoming part of a sober bike club.
Video.grandparentTitle: Operation Fishing Freedom - Vietnam Medic John Hitchens
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Charter boat captain Mike Macko recounts his grueling life in the engine room aboard a U.S. Navy ship in the South Pacific theatre.
Video.grandparentTitle: Mike Macko
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The night bite in Sturgeon Bay is on fire! In this week's episode, we’re meeting with our good friends Lonney Goman from Greenbay Trophy Fishing and Scott Meiller from Rebel Converting to catch some walleye. Hold onto your hineys folks, this will be a long night!
Video.grandparentTitle: Larry Smith Outdoors
Video.title: Night Fishing Walleye

Video.summary: Season 8 Episode 3 kicks off our first open-water shoot of the year as Paul Ethier and Jeff Shippam make their way to the legendary Mattagami Lake for some classic spring walleye action. With competitive tournaments on pause this season, the guys revisit their favourite early-season hotspots—areas they’d normally fish under pressure—now with time to explore, adapt, and enjoy the day. From structure-hopping to dialing in the spring pattern, Paul and Jeff put their tournament instincts to work for a fun, relaxed day chasing hungry post-spawn walleye in Northern Ontario.
Video.grandparentTitle: Remote Lakes, Big Fish, Epic Days
Video.title: FishON | Spring Break on Mattagami Lake

Image.alt: FishON | Spring Break on Mattagami Lake
FishON | Spring Break on Mattagami Lake
FishON | Spring Break on Mattagami Lake

Video.summary: Dustin uses cool new bait to help catch finicky bass
Video.grandparentTitle: Catching Bass | New Spin on Finesse
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin is off to Central Florida to fish with veteran angler Bernie Schultz.
Video.grandparentTitle: Catching Bass | Feel the Bern
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim visits Cast Industries to see how lure molds are made. Then he visits Lure Parts Online to show you how to pour your own soft plastic baits.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angler's Workshop | Making Lure Molds & Pouring soft plastics
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin fishes a finesse topwater bait for bass in Early Summer
Video.grandparentTitle: Catching Bass | Tiny Topwater Fun
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim shows you, in detail how to build your own Ned Rig rod.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angler's Workshop | Building A Ned Rig Rod
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Today on Stoked On Fishing, we head offshore on the Stoked On Fishing Charters 35-foot Everglades with an All-Star crew searching for bluefin tuna. We take out Okuma Fishing Tackles President Doug and John, head of product development. We also have on board Colin and his wife, Amanda from Grundens, and our friend Toby from Mag Bay Lures and Mag Bay Resort down in Baja, Mexico. This trip was absolutely nuts, with the best Blue Fin Tuna fishing we have seen in Sothern California all year.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing | Southern California Bluefin Tuna Fishing at Its Finest
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: This episode is all about Swimbaits, perhaps the most versatile tool in the tackle box for catching just about everything that swims.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz - All About Swimbaits
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Join the Stoked on Fishing crew as they travel to incredible fishing destinations, chase down a wide variety of species, and share the stories of the people and places behind each catch. Whether it’s offshore, inshore, freshwater, or somewhere off the beaten path, every episode brings you along for the adventure — with real anglers, real conditions, and no scripted nonsense.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing | Party Boat Fishing on the Ranger 85 (Part 3)
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jimmy takes you on a tour of the Wonders of Wildlife Museum in Missouri.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jimmy Houston Fishing - Learning About Wildlife
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jimmy is Fishing with Jay Matthews, a high school fishing coach in Alabama
Video.grandparentTitle: Jimmy Houston Fishing - Fishing Coach
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim talks with award winning host of Big Water Adventures Mark Davis.
Video.grandparentTitle: Slickfish Radio | Mark Davis
Video.title: Episode 1
